title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABUYOG, PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1784 / 55 OG No. 39, 8263 (September 28, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2565, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABUYOG, PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
